2370-the-enterprise-d-receives-a-new-war: The Enterprise-D receives a new warp core built with interphasic techniques on Thanatos VII, which brings aboard interphasic organisms that attach to the crew until a method is devised to remove them.
2370-the-skrreea-arrive-from-the-gamma-q: The Skrreea arrive from the Gamma Quadrant searching for the mythical planet Kentanna.
2370-the-terran-rebellion-begins: In the mirror universe, the Terran Rebellion begins.
2370-the-uss-equinox-commanded-by-captai: The USS Equinox, commanded by Captain Rudolph Ransom, is commissioned.
2370-the-uss-pegasus-is-found-in-the-dev: The USS Pegasus is found in the Devolin system; Admiral Erik Pressman retrieves its phasing cloak and installs it aboard the Enterprise-D to escape an asteroid, exposing illegal Starfleet involvement in the device's development and testing.
2370-verad-boards-deep-space-9-while-the: While Deep Space 9 runs on a skeleton crew, Verad boards the station to steal the Dax symbiont from Jadzia Dax, but Benjamin Sisko stops him and the symbiont is returned to Jadzia.
2370-wesley-crusher-leaves-starfleet-aca: Wesley Crusher leaves Starfleet Academy to join the Traveler in exploring alternate planes of reality.
2370-while-searching-for-suitable-planet: Searching for colony sites near the wormhole, Benjamin Sisko and Miles O'Brien discover a lost Erewon-class colony ship and colonists who have lived a decade under an artificial EM field; its creators, Alixus and her son Vinod, are taken to stand trial for the deaths that field caused over the years.
2370-william-t-riker-and-deanna-troi-obs: William T. Riker and Deanna Troi observe the final adventure of the original Enterprise.
2370-zar-begins-his-association-with-dal: Zar begins a six-year association with Dala in which he never once sees her do menial labor.
2370-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the twenty-fourth year running.
2370-zim-brott-begins-to-serve-aboard-de: Zim Brott begins serving aboard Deep Space 9.
2371-according-to-william-riker-the-fusi: According to William Riker, the fusion reactor in the Uxbridge house would last until this year.
2371-benjamin-sisko-is-killed-by-the-kli: In the mirror universe, the Klingon-Cardassian Alliance kills Benjamin Sisko; Miles 'Smiley' O'Brien recruits the prime-universe Sisko to temporarily take his counterpart's place.
2371-benjamin-sisko-is-promoted-by-starf: Starfleet Command promotes Benjamin Sisko from commander to captain.
2371-captain-james-t-kirk-emerges-from-t: Kirk leaves the Nexus and dies helping Picard stop Soran from destroying the Veridian system.
2371-deep-space-9-is-spared-destruction-: Deep Space 9 narrowly escapes destruction, spared by mere seconds after a legacy counter-insurgency program installed by the station's original Cardassian commander is inadvertently triggered.
2371-dr-tolian-soran-uses-a-trilithium-w: Tolian Soran collapses the Amargosa star with a trilithium solar probe.
2371-ensign-samantha-wildman-discovers-s: Ensign Samantha Wildman discovers she is pregnant while stranded aboard Voyager in the Delta Quadrant.
2371-it-is-discovered-that-the-founders-: The Founders of the Dominion are discovered to have infiltrated the Alpha Quadrant.
2371-jennifer-sisko-defects-to-the-terra: In the mirror universe, Jennifer Sisko defects to the Terran Rebellion.
2371-kar-a-young-kazon-ogla-begins-his-c: Kar, a young Kazon-Ogla, begins combat training on Tarok.
2371-kes-travels-to-this-year-from-five-: Kes travels back to this year from five years into the original future, trying to trade Voyager's crew to the Vidiians for safe passage home to Ocampa for both her present and future selves; when the plan fails, Janeway is forced to kill her, and Kes projects a hologram to stop her future self from ever traveling back, altering history.
2371-kira-nerys-speaks-to-latha-mabrin-f: Kira Nerys speaks to Latha Mabrin for what will ultimately be the last time.
2371-lurak-t-luco-is-released-from-priso: Lurak T'Luco is released from prison after serving five years for hijacking, theft, and assault.
2371-marina-derex-s-labyrinths-of-the-mi: Marina Derex's Labyrinths of the Mind is published.
2371-martok-is-captured-by-the-dominion-: The Dominion captures Martok on Kang's Summit and sends him to Internment Camp 371.
2371-neelix-and-kes-join-the-voyager-cre: Neelix and Kes join the Voyager crew.
2371-originally-voyager-discovered-the-c: In the original timeline, Voyager finds a class M planet devastated by a polaric ion energy explosion from the day before; Captain Janeway and Tom Paris are thrown back before the explosion by a subspace fracture, and when the crew's rescue attempt with a polaric generator instead causes the original blast and kills all life on the planet, including the captain, Janeway resets time by closing the fracture first, creating a new timeline in which Voyager never visits the planet and its civilization survives.
2371-quark-visits-his-family-home-for-th: Quark visits his family home for the first time in twenty years.
2371-reginald-barclay-transfers-to-jupit: Reginald Barclay transfers to Jupiter Station to work in Dr. Lewis Zimmerman's holographic laboratory, testing the Emergency Medical Hologram's interpersonal skills.
2371-robert-picard-and-his-son-ren-die-i: A fire at the family home in La Barre kills Robert Picard and his son René.
2371-seska-s-true-roots-as-a-cardassian-: Seska's true identity as a Cardassian spy is revealed; she betrays the Voyager crew and joins the Kazon.
2371-several-crewmembers-on-voyager-incl: Several Voyager crew members, including first officer Cavit, flight control officer Stadi, the chief medical officer, and the chief engineer, die during the ship's transit to the Delta Quadrant.
2371-smiley-steals-the-design-schematics: During a visit to Deep Space 9, the mirror universe's Smiley steals the design schematics for the USS Defiant.
2371-sometime-around-this-year-variable-: Around this year, Federation starships begin introducing variable geometry pylons.
2371-starfleet-introduces-a-new-combadge: Starfleet adopts a new combadge, a gold rectangle around a cut-out oval.
2371-steve-levy-is-promoted-to-lieutenan: Steve Levy is promoted to lieutenant.
2371-the-bajoran-shakaar-edon-a-former-c: Bajoran Shakaar Edon, a former Resistance cell leader, becomes first minister of Bajor's provisional government.
2371-the-cardassian-obsidian-order-toget: The Cardassian Obsidian Order and Romulan Tal Shiar are lured into a trap when they attack the Founders' homeworld in the Gamma Quadrant; the resulting battle destroys their combined twenty-ship fleet and cripples both organizations, leaving only the Federation and the Klingon Empire as meaningful resistance to the Dominion.
2371-the-enterprise-is-destroyed-over-ve: The Enterprise-D is lost over Veridian III, most of the crew surviving the saucer's crash landing.
2371-the-federation-as-well-as-the-other: The Federation and the other Alpha and Beta Quadrant powers learn of the Dominion threat after the USS Defiant returns from its mission to the Founders' homeworld in the Gamma Quadrant.
2371-the-maquis-member-thomas-riker-stea: Maquis member Thomas Riker steals the USS Defiant and uses it to expose a Cardassian military buildup in the Orias system.
2371-the-obsidian-order-exposes-legate-t: The Obsidian Order exposes Legate Tekeny Ghemor's ties to the Cardassian dissident movement.
2371-the-romulan-star-empire-sends-ruwon: The Romulan Star Empire sends Ruwon and Karina to Deep Space 9 to collect Starfleet's Dominion data, per an earlier agreement allowing the USS Defiant to use a cloaking device, while secretly sending a Warbird to destroy the station and the wormhole; the plan fails after Miles O'Brien, having foreseen the future, warns Benjamin Sisko.
2371-the-starship-uss-equinox-disappears: The Caretaker pulls the USS Equinox into the Delta Quadrant; setting a return course, it encounters the Krowtonan Guard and is severely damaged, losing half its crew.
2371-the-starship-uss-voyager-departs-de: The USS Voyager departs Deep Space 9 to find the Maquis raider Val Jean; the Caretaker hurls both ships seventy-five thousand light-years into the Delta Quadrant, and after Captain Kathryn Janeway destroys the Caretaker's array to protect the Ocampa, the two crews must work together to find their way back to the Alpha Quadrant.
2371-the-uss-enterprise-undergoes-a-majo: The USS Enterprise undergoes a major refit.
2371-the-uss-olympia-crashes-on-a-planet: The USS Olympia crashes on a planet in the Rutharian sector; the planet's energy barrier delays Captain Lisa Cusak's distress call by three years before the USS Defiant intercepts it, and Cusak dies on the planet.
2371-tuvok-joins-chakotay-s-maquis-cell-: Tuvok joins Chakotay's Maquis cell as an undercover Starfleet operative.
2371-voyager-approaches-an-m-class-plane: As Voyager approaches an M-class planet, Kes reports a vision of it being destroyed, but finds it teeming with life instead; judging it a pre-warp civilization, Captain Janeway logs the sighting and orders Voyager onward to the Alpha Quadrant.
2371-voyager-discovers-a-micro-wormhole-: Voyager discovers a micro-wormhole leading to the Alpha Quadrant and uses a probe to relay a message to the Romulan science vessel Talvath, commanded by Telek R'Mor, before learning the wormhole is actually a rift through time and R'Mor is transmitting from 2351; he agrees to carry the crew's personal messages to Starfleet, but is later found to have died in 2367 without ever delivering them.
2371-voyager-lands-on-a-planet-in-the-de: Voyager lands on a Delta Quadrant planet and discovers a colony of humans, including Amelia Earhart, transported there by the Briori centuries earlier.
2371-voyager-makes-first-contact-with-th: Voyager makes first contact with the Ocampa, Talaxians, and Kazon.
2371-voyager-s-tom-paris-is-convicted-of: Tuvok proves Tom Paris innocent of murdering the Banean Tolen Ren, after Paris is convicted, uncovering a Numiri plot to steal Ren's technology.
2371-with-help-from-bareil-antos-kai-win: With help from Bareil Antos, Kai Winn and Legate Turrel sign the Bajoran-Cardassian Treaty, sending political shockwaves through the Alpha Quadrant; Bareil dies soon after.
2371-worf-is-promoted-to-lieutenant-comm: Worf is promoted to lieutenant commander.
2371-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the twenty-fifth year running.
2372-a-cardassian-missile-reprogrammed-b: Voyager finds a Cardassian missile reprogrammed by B'Elanna Torres on a course to destroy a planet in the Delta Quadrant; Torres destroys it before impact.
2372-a-member-of-the-q-continuum-quinn-i: Voyager's crew frees Q Continuum member Quinn from his confinement in a comet; after a brief trial he relinquishes his powers to become human and commit suicide, obtaining poison from Q, an act that sparks civil war in the Continuum.
2372-a-transporter-accident-combines-tuv: A transporter accident merges Tuvok and Neelix into a single being, Tuvix, whom Captain Janeway later separates back into his two halves against his will.
2372-admiral-leyton-stages-a-military-co: Admiral Leyton stages a military coup by exploiting the Changeling scare, but Benjamin Sisko and Odo thwart it; Leyton resigns his commission, and Sisko and Odo return to Deep Space 9.
2372-after-being-convicted-of-espionage-: After being convicted of espionage, Miles O'Brien is given the memories of a twenty-year prison sentence on Argratha.
2372-an-annari-warship-commanded-by-gene: An Annari warship commanded by General Valen becomes trapped in the Void.
2372-captain-benjamin-sisko-takes-the-us: Captain Benjamin Sisko takes the Defiant to the Founders' homeworld hoping they can cure Odo, but learns Weyoun deliberately infected him with the disease to force his return; as punishment for killing a Changeling the previous year, Odo is turned into a solid.
2372-captain-janeway-and-commander-chako: An insect bite infects Captain Janeway and Commander Chakotay, forcing them to stay behind on the planet where they were bitten; Tuvok commands Voyager for six weeks until a cure is obtained from the Vidiians.
2372-captain-kathryn-janeway-attempts-to: Captain Kathryn Janeway attempts to broker an alliance among Kazon sects to end their attacks on Voyager, but the Trabe's attempt to wipe out the Kazon delegates ends the negotiations.
2372-commander-chakotay-discovers-the-sk: Commander Chakotay discovers the Sky Spirits, who visited Earth some forty-five thousand years earlier, living on a Delta Quadrant planet, and reveals himself to be a descendant of the Inheritors.
2372-commander-chakotay-is-taken-prisone: Commander Chakotay is taken prisoner by the Kazon-Ogla after drifting into their space during the pakra ceremony; he and a young Kazon named Kar escape a carrier vessel to the moon Tarok, after which Kar earns his name by killing Jal Razik and Chakotay completes the pakra ceremony aboard Voyager.
2372-convinced-by-a-changeling-posing-as: A Changeling posing as General Martok convinces the Klingon Empire to invade the Cardassian Union over supposed Founder infiltration; Federation objections lead Chancellor Gowron to withdraw from the Khitomer Accords, and by year's end the same Changeling convinces him to annex the Archanis sector from the Federation, starting open war between the two powers.
2372-doctor-julian-bashir-is-able-to-pre: Doctor Julian Bashir prevents unborn children on Boranis III from contracting a plague the Dominion sent to punish the planet for rejecting its offer of membership.
2372-greta-vanderweg-is-transferred-to-d: Greta Vanderweg is transferred to Deep Space 9.
2372-hector-ilario-graduates-from-starfl: Hector Ilario graduates from Starfleet Academy.
2372-jennifer-sisko-is-killed: In the mirror universe, Jennifer Sisko is killed.
2372-kira-nerys-begins-a-relationship-wi: Kira Nerys begins a relationship with Shakaar Edon.
2372-kurn-is-given-a-new-identity-after-: Kurn is given a new identity after the House of Mogh's dishonor.
2372-michael-jonas-begins-secretly-feedi: Michael Jonas begins secretly feeding the Kazon-Nistrim information about Voyager; Lieutenant Tuvok detects the transmissions but cannot identify the source, so Captain Janeway and Tuvok have Tom Paris feign discontent to be captured by the Kazon and extract evidence exposing the traitor.
2372-michael-jonas-is-revealed-to-be-the: Michael Jonas is exposed as the traitor feeding Voyager's secrets to the Kazon and dies in a fight with Neelix.
2372-miles-o-brien-and-julian-bashir-are: Jem'Hadar forces capture Miles O'Brien and Julian Bashir; their leader Goran'Agar orders Bashir to find a cure for his men's ketracel-white addiction.
2372-regent-worf-attempts-to-retake-tero: In the mirror universe, Regent Worf's attempt to retake Terok Nor from the rebels fails against the newly completed Defiant, commanded by the prime reality's Captain Sisko.
2372-starfleet-detects-unusual-activity-: Unusual activity is picked up along the Romulan Neutral Zone.
2372-starfleet-introduces-styles-of-phas: Starfleet introduces new styles of phasers and tricorders this year.
2372-the-antwerp-conference-is-bombed-an: A Changeling's bomb destroys the Antwerp Conference; Benjamin Sisko is temporarily reassigned to Earth as Chief of Starfleet Security to prepare the Federation for a possible Dominion invasion.
2372-the-bajoran-wormhole-undergoes-an-i: The Bajoran wormhole undergoes an inversion that occurs once every fifty years.
2372-the-doctor-begins-a-brief-relations: The Doctor begins a brief relationship with the Vidiian Danara Pel.
2372-the-kazon-nistrim-briefly-steal-tra: The Kazon-Nistrim briefly steal transporter technology from Voyager; Chakotay disables the technology and returns to the ship, but not before Seska reveals she stole his DNA to impregnate herself.
2372-the-klingon-empire-attacks-three-ro: The Klingon Empire attacks three Romulan outposts along the border.
2372-the-korma-conference-was-scheduled-: A Klingon Bird-of-Prey, later commandeered by Gul Dukat, destroys the outpost meant to host the scheduled Korma Conference.
2372-the-nanut-was-expected-to-end-its-t: The Nanut is expected to end its two-year mission to the Gamma Quadrant this year.
2372-the-terran-rebellion-captures-terok: In the mirror universe, the Terran Rebellion captures Terok Nor and begins building the ISS Defiant from schematics stolen from Deep Space 9 the previous year.
2372-the-uss-enterprise-is-launched-from: The USS Enterprise-E is launched from the San Francisco Fleet Yards.
2372-the-war-between-the-druoda-and-an-u: The war between the Druoda and an unnamed Delta Quadrant species ends.
2372-violating-the-rules-of-ferengi-soci: In violation of Ferengi custom, Quark's employees, led by Rom, unionize and strike; Quark secretly meets their demands to protect his brother, dissolving the union, and Rom leaves to join Chief Miles O'Brien's engineering crew on Deep Space 9.
2372-voyager-discovers-a-new-type-of-dil: Voyager discovers a new type of dilithium that lets a shuttlecraft piloted by Tom Paris reach warp 10, but the resulting transwarp proves harmful to humanoid DNA and is abandoned.
2372-voyager-encounters-a-plasma-drift-w: A plasma drift duplicates every molecule aboard Voyager, severely damaging one copy and killing Harry Kim in a hull breach as Naomi Wildman is born to Samantha Wildman during the crisis; Vidiians later attack the other Voyager, which sends Kim and the surviving Wildman infant to the damaged ship before self-destructing.
2372-voyager-encounters-the-caretaker-s-: Voyager encounters the Caretaker's mate, Suspiria, and finds her hostile.
2372-voyager-is-taken-by-the-kazon-nistr: Aided by Seska, the Kazon-Nistrim seize Voyager and maroon its crew on Hanon IV.
2372-while-escorting-a-medical-convoy-to: While escorting a medical convoy to Pentath III, Lieutenant Commander Worf accidentally destroys what he believes is a Klingon civilian convoy; the Klingon Empire seeks his extradition for 441 deaths, until it is revealed the transport was empty and had faked its readings to justify war, with the real casualty list belonging to an unrelated accidental crash three months earlier.
2372-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the twenty-sixth year running.
2373-a-deep-space-9-salvage-team-led-by-: A Deep Space 9 salvage team led by Miles O'Brien visits Empok Nor.
2373-a-group-of-talaxians-lead-by-oxilon: A group of Talaxians led by Oxilon establishes an asteroid colony.
2373-a-starfleet-team-lead-by-benjamin-s: A Starfleet team led by Benjamin Sisko successfully captures a Jem'Hadar attack ship.
2373-after-the-real-identity-of-the-klin: Exposing the real General Martok as a Changeling ends the Federation-Klingon war with a temporary ceasefire.
2373-b-elanna-torres-begins-to-have-drea: B'Elanna Torres begins having dreams that turn out to be memories implanted by an elderly Enaran woman.
2373-general-martok-is-given-command-of-: General Martok is given command of the IKS Rotarran and successfully rescues survivors of the IKS B'Moth.
2373-in-the-delta-quadrant-the-crew-of-v: In the Delta Quadrant, the Voyager crew discovers the Voth, a species that evolved on Earth and migrated there several million years earlier.
2373-jake-sisko-is-successful-in-obtaini: Jake Sisko succeeds in obtaining a Willie Mays baseball card for his father Benjamin.
2373-julian-bashir-is-replaced-by-a-chan: Julian Bashir is replaced by a Changeling.
2373-keiko-o-brien-is-inhabited-by-a-pah: A Pah-wraith inhabits Keiko O'Brien and tries to kill the Prophets before Miles O'Brien stops it and the entity is expelled from her body.
2373-kirayoshi-o-brien-the-second-child-: Kirayoshi O'Brien, the second child of Miles and Keiko O'Brien, is born.
2373-klingon-chancellor-gowron-reinstate: Klingon Chancellor Gowron reinstates the Khitomer Accords with the Federation.
2373-lieutenant-tuvok-began-suffering-fr: Lieutenant Tuvok begins suffering from a memory virus accidentally transferred to his mind eighty years earlier, in 2293, by Dimitri Valtane; with Kathryn Janeway serving as his pyllora, the two investigate the virus's cause and inadvertently relive memories of Tuvok's first Starfleet posting aboard the USS Excelsior under Captain Hikaru Sulu.
2373-quark-and-odo-get-stranded-on-a-rem: Quark and Odo become stranded on a remote class L planet and must work together to survive and return to Deep Space 9.
2373-silaran-prin-begins-his-revenge-on-: Silaran Prin begins taking revenge on the Shakaar resistance cell, killing most of its former members before Kira Nerys stops him.
2373-starfleet-command-declares-voyager-: Starfleet declares Voyager lost with all hands; Janeway begins writing letters home.
2373-starfleet-introduces-a-new-uniform-: Starfleet rolls out a new uniform, with quilted grey shoulders and division colour on the undershirt and cuffs.
2373-tekeny-ghemor-visits-deep-space-9-a: Tekeny Ghemor visits Deep Space 9 to undergo the Shri-tal ritual and dies shortly after.
2373-the-bashir-changeling-is-exposed-an: The Bashir Changeling is exposed and killed, and the real Bashir resumes his post on Deep Space 9 after five weeks' confinement at Internment Camp 371.
2373-the-borg-and-species-8472-go-to-war: The Borg and Species 8472 go to war after the Borg attempt to invade Species 8472's native fluidic space.
2373-the-cardassian-union-officially-joi: The Cardassian Union officially joins the Dominion.
2373-the-doctor-uncovers-that-commander-: The Doctor discovers that Commander Chakotay did not father Seska's child as believed, and that Maje Culluh is the true father.
2373-the-dominion-invades-the-alpha-quad: The Dominion invades the Alpha Quadrant.
2373-the-dominion-signs-non-aggression-t: The Dominion signs non-aggression treaties with several powers, including the Romulans, Tholians, Miradorn, and Bajorans.
2373-the-macrovirus-infects-the-crew-abo: A macrovirus infects Voyager's crew, and Kathryn Janeway must find a way to restore them.
2373-the-planet-gaia-is-discovered-sever: The planet Gaia is discovered, but weeks later its quantum energy barrier becomes impassable, sealing it off; in an erased timeline, the barrier had thrown the Defiant two hundred years into the past, and the ship's crew and their descendants colonized the planet.
2373-the-q-civil-war-ends-in-this-year-w: The Q Civil War ends this year with the birth of a new Q.
2373-the-second-battle-of-deep-space-9-t: In the Second Battle of Deep Space 9, the Dominion seizes control of the Bajor sector, including the Federation station at its crucial position beside the wormhole to the Gamma Quadrant.
2373-the-second-major-borg-incursion-the: The Borg's second incursion is broken at the Battle of Sector 001, and the Enterprise-E follows a sphere back to 2063.
2373-the-uss-defiant-and-its-crew-are-tr: The USS Defiant and its crew are transported back to the 23rd century, where they encounter the crew of the USS Enterprise and stop Arne Darvin from killing James T. Kirk.
2373-the-uss-farragut-is-destroyed-by-th: The Klingons destroy the USS Farragut while it defends the colonists of Ajilon Prime.
2373-the-uss-voyager-is-retaken-by-tom-p: Tom Paris and a group of Talaxians led by Commander Paxim retake the USS Voyager, killing Seska in the process, and recover the crew marooned on Hanon IV before the ship escapes Kazon Collective space at maximum warp through a nearby nebula.
2373-vorik-begins-undergoing-pon-farr-an: Vorik begins undergoing pon farr and initiates an unwanted mating bond with B'Elanna Torres.
2373-voyager-is-thrown-into-the-year-199: Encountering the timeship Aeon throws Voyager into the year 1996; the ship later returns to its own time carrying a mobile emitter that lets the Doctor operate outside a holographic generator's range.
2373-with-the-dominion-as-their-new-ally: With the Dominion as its new ally, the Cardassian Union succeeds in ending the Maquis rebellion in the Demilitarized Zone.
2373-worf-jadzia-dax-quark-julian-bashir: Worf, Jadzia Dax, Quark, Julian Bashir, and Leeta visit Risa.
2373-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the twenty-seventh year running, securing a comeback victory with Ishka's advice.
2374-alexander-rozhenko-transfers-to-the: Alexander Rozhenko transfers to the IKS Rotarran, where he and his father Worf reconcile.
2374-an-alien-named-arturis-attempts-to-: An alien named Arturis tries to trap the Voyager crew aboard a fake Starfleet vessel, the USS Dauntless; his deception is exposed, but Voyager's crew learns quantum slipstream drive technology in the process, closing several hundred light-years of the journey home.
2374-b-elanna-torres-undergoes-the-kling: B'Elanna Torres undergoes the Klingon Day of Honor ritual.
2374-bareil-antos-and-intendant-kira-cro: Bareil Antos and Intendant Kira, from the mirror universe, cross over to steal an Orb.
2374-benjamin-sisko-leads-a-team-to-dest: Benjamin Sisko leads a team to destroy a ketracel-white facility using the Jem'Hadar attack ship captured the previous year; after crash-landing on a rogue planet in a dark matter nebula, they encounter Jem'Hadar and their Vorta before Keevan betrays the Jem'Hadar, letting Sisko's team escape.
2374-dukat-escapes-federation-custody-ju: Dukat escapes Federation custody just before his war crimes trial and vows to destroy Bajor.
2374-gabriel-hwang-is-born-on-hellas-pla: Gabriel Hwang is born on Hellas Planitia to Jae Hwang and Raffaela Musiker.
2374-grand-nagus-zek-is-briefly-deposed-: Grand Nagus Zek is briefly deposed but soon reinstated thanks to Quark's female alter ego, Lumba.
2374-in-an-alternate-timeline-voyager-is: In an alternate timeline, Krenim forces attack Voyager shortly after its astrometrics lab activates, keeping the ship under nearly a year of constant assault until it is barely functional and most of the crew abandon ship; the timeline is restored after Voyager rams and destroys Annorax's weapon ship.
2374-in-first-battle-of-chin-toka-a-comb: In the First Battle of Chin'toka, a combined Federation, Klingon, and Romulan fleet successfully invades the Chin'toka system.
2374-investigating-a-subspace-compressio: Investigating a subspace compression, the Defiant is taken over by the Jem'Hadar, but the miniaturized USS Rubicon stops them before they reach a Dominion base.
2374-kes-psionic-abilities-are-hyperacce: Telepathic contact with Species 8472 hyperaccelerates Kes's psionic abilities, and she leaves Voyager, pushing the ship clear of Borg space and 9,500 light-years closer to Earth.
2374-miles-o-brien-infiltrates-the-orion: Miles O'Brien infiltrates the Orion Syndicate, befriends Liam Bilby, and discovers the Syndicate is working with the Dominion.
2374-molly-o-brien-falls-through-a-time-: Molly O'Brien falls through a time portal on Golana and ages eight years before being brought back and eventually restored to normal.
2374-morn-fakes-his-own-death-to-ensure-: Morn fakes his own death to ensure his former partners in the Lissepian Mother's Day Heist are caught.
2374-neral-becomes-praetor-of-the-romula: Neral becomes Praetor of the Romulan Star Empire.
2374-omega-molecules-are-produced-by-a-c: A Delta Quadrant civilization produces omega molecules; Voyager retrieves them, and Seven of Nine stabilizes the molecules shortly before they are destroyed.
2374-operation-return-one-of-the-greates: In Operation Return, one of the Dominion War's greatest engagements, combined Federation and Klingon forces recapture the Bajor sector, including Deep Space 9.
2374-quark-s-mother-ishka-is-taken-priso: The Dominion takes Quark's mother Ishka prisoner during a trip to Vulcan; Quark assembles a team of himself, Rom, Nog, Brunt, Leck, and Gaila and rescues her on Empok Nor.
2374-reginald-barclay-leaves-the-uss-ent: Reginald Barclay leaves the Enterprise for San Francisco, later beginning work on the Pathfinder Project.
2374-section-31-agent-luther-sloan-attem: Section 31 agent Luther Sloan attempts to recruit Julian Bashir into the organization.
2374-sneed-is-released-from-prison-he-ha: Sneed is released from prison, having served four years for smuggling.
2374-the-annari-empire-starts-a-blockade: The Annari Empire starts a blockade of the Kraylor homeworld.
2374-the-crew-of-the-uss-voyager-enter-b: Voyager helps the Borg drive Species 8472 back into fluidic space, gaining Seven of Nine in the aftermath.
2374-the-doctor-and-b-elanna-torres-find: The Doctor and B'Elanna Torres find themselves at the mercy of an insane hologram.
2374-the-dominion-introduces-a-new-class: The Dominion introduces a new class of Jem'Hadar battleship; the USS Valiant's attempt to exploit a design flaw in one fails, and the Valiant is destroyed with relative ease.
2374-the-dominion-invades-and-occupies-b: The Dominion invades and occupies Betazed.
2374-the-nel-bato-conference-is-held-whe: At the Nel Bato Conference, Picard meets Hars Adislo and his paper on thermionic transconductance.
2374-the-reckoning-begins-with-the-disco: The Reckoning begins with the discovery of a Kosst Amojan tablet on Bajor, unleashing disasters across the planet, including a tornado at Tamulna, until Kai Winn Adami's intervention halts the havoc.
2374-the-romulan-star-empire-joins-the-f: The Romulan Star Empire joins the Federation and Klingon Empire's war against the Dominion after Senator Vreenak obtains evidence, questionable but sufficient, of a planned Dominion sneak attack on the Star Empire - evidence in fact fabricated by Benjamin Sisko, Elim Garak, and Grathon Tolar.
2374-the-seventh-fleet-fails-to-stop-the: The Seventh Fleet fails to stop the Dominion in the Tyra system, with only fourteen of its one hundred twelve ships returning to Federation lines.
2374-the-uss-defiant-responds-to-a-distr: The Defiant responds to a distress call from Captain Lisa Cusak of the USS Olympia, only to discover she had been dead for years, though her voice deeply affects Deep Space 9's senior staff.
2374-the-uss-defiant-successfully-destro: The Defiant destroys a Dominion sensor array in the Argolis Cluster.
2374-the-uss-protostar-commanded-by-capt: The USS Protostar, commanded by Captain Chakotay and Commander Adreek-Hu, arrives from 2436 through the Solum wormhole and crash-lands on a desolate planet, where it remains marooned for the next ten years.
2374-through-the-actions-of-dukat-a-pah-: Through Dukat's actions, a Pah-wraith is released into the Bajoran wormhole, sealing it and cutting the Bajorans off from the Prophets; Dukat kills Jadzia Dax in the process.
2374-tuvok-is-promoted-to-lieutenant-com: Tuvok is promoted to lieutenant commander.
2374-vic-fontaine-is-activated-for-the-f: Vic Fontaine is activated for the first time on Deep Space 9; with his help, Odo and Kira Nerys begin dating.
2374-vice-admiral-fujisaki-dies-of-food-: Vice Admiral Fujisaki dies of food poisoning, though Section 31 suspects foul play.
2374-voyager-briefly-reestablishes-conta: Voyager briefly reaches the Alpha Quadrant over a Hirogen network, and some of the crew receive letters from home.
2374-voyager-crewmembers-seven-of-nine-a: Voyager crew members Seven of Nine and Harry Kim build an astrometrics laboratory with Borg-inspired technology, letting the ship chart a more efficient course to the Alpha Quadrant.
2374-voyager-is-attacked-and-boarded-by-: The Hirogen attack and board Voyager to use its holodecks for holographic battles, reassigning the crew's identities to fit their simulations, until the ship is returned to Starfleet control in exchange for a holographic generator.
2374-voyager-passes-through-a-mutara-cla: Voyager passes through a Mutara-class nebula on a month-long transit, placing the crew in stasis except for Seven of Nine and the Doctor to counteract the nebula's harm to organic tissue.
2374-voyager-s-crew-is-duplicated-by-the: The Silver Blood duplicates Voyager's crew on a class Y planet; after the original ship departs, the duplicate crew leaves the planet too and eventually forgets its origins, setting a course for the Alpha Quadrant.
2374-worf-and-jadzia-dax-are-married-in-: Worf and Jadzia Dax marry in a traditional Klingon wedding ceremony on Deep Space 9.
2375-a-defective-clone-of-the-vorta-weyo: A defective clone of the Vorta Weyoun attempts to defect to the Federation but sacrifices himself to save Odo's life, warning him before he dies that a sickness, later identified as the morphogenic virus, is spreading through the Great Link and killing the Founders.
2375-a-jack-in-the-box-in-the-bashir-62-: A jack-in-the-box in the Bashir 62 holoprogram causes Vic Fontaine to lose his casino to Frank Chalmers; the Deep Space 9 crew stages a heist that steals it back and restores Vic's Lounge.
2375-a-joint-federation-romulan-conferen: At a joint Federation-Romulan conference on Romulus, Section 31, with Admiral William Ross's cooperation and Julian Bashir's reluctant help, meddles in Romulan politics to keep Kimara Cretak off the Continuing Committee.
2375-according-to-quark-by-this-year-bro: According to Quark, Broik would by this year have paid off the six-year debt from buying useless Yamok sauce in 2369.
2375-admiral-dougherty-of-starfleet-and-: Admiral Dougherty and the Son'a try to remove the Ba'ku to harvest their rings' metaphasic radiation, and Picard intervenes.
2375-aging-klingon-legend-kor-seeks-worf: Aging Klingon legend Kor seeks Worf's help to obtain a command so he can feel useful in the Dominion War; he later stops Worf from leading a suicide mission against ten Jem'Hadar ships, taking command himself and dying in a blaze of glory.
2375-at-the-request-of-chancellor-martok: At Chancellor Martok's request, Worf becomes the Federation ambassador to Qo'noS.
2375-b-elanna-torres-refuses-to-take-med: B'Elanna Torres refuses life-saving medical treatment from a holographic representation of the infamous Cardassian Doctor Crell Moset.
2375-b-elanna-torres-suffers-severe-inte: B'Elanna Torres suffers severe internal injuries running high-risk holoprograms with the safety protocols disabled.
2375-benjamin-sisko-accompanied-by-his-s: Accompanied by his son, father, and Ezri Dax, Benjamin Sisko finds the Orb of the Emissary, reopening the Bajoran wormhole and returning to Deep Space 9.
2375-benjamin-sisko-and-kasidy-yates-are: Benjamin Sisko and Kasidy Yates marry aboard Deep Space 9.
2375-benjamin-sisko-buys-twelve-hecapate: Benjamin Sisko buys twelve hecapates of land on Bajor to build a retirement home, proposes to Kasidy Yates, and asks his son Jake to be best man, though the Prophets later warn him against going through with the marriage.
2375-by-this-year-piracy-becomes-far-les: By this year, piracy becomes far less common among the Orion people.
2375-captain-benjamin-sisko-is-lost-pres: Captain Benjamin Sisko is lost, presumed dead, in the Fire Caves on Bajor along with Dukat and Kai Winn Adami, prompting the Bajorans to begin electing a new kai; Sisko later appears to his wife Kasidy Yates-Sisko, telling her he is with the Prophets in the Celestial Temple.
2375-captain-jean-luc-picard-is-awarded-: Captain Jean-Luc Picard is awarded the Circle of Galaxies.
2375-captain-kathryn-janeway-learns-that: Captain Kathryn Janeway learns that a family tale about her ancestor Shannon O'Donnel has been exaggerated.
2375-commanders-william-t-riker-and-dean: William Riker and Deanna Troi resume their relationship.
2375-damar-s-cardassian-rebellion-is-cru: Damar's Cardassian Rebellion is crushed, but Cardassian citizens rise up against the Dominion in response; the Jem'Hadar retaliate by destroying Cardassian cities and killing millions, and Damar is killed attempting to storm Dominion Headquarters.
2375-determined-to-free-his-world-from-d: Determined to free his world from Dominion occupation, Damar forms and leads the Cardassian Rebellion.
2375-doctor-julian-bashir-performs-an-op: Doctor Julian Bashir performs an operation on Sarina Douglas that frees her from her catatonic state.
2375-dukat-is-surgically-altered-to-rese: Dukat is surgically altered to resemble a Bajoran.
2375-elim-garak-suffers-an-emotional-bre: Elim Garak suffers an emotional breakdown under the pressure of helping Starfleet wage war against his Dominion-occupied homeworld; Ezri Dax helps him recover and decides to remain on Deep Space 9 as the station's counselor.
2375-ezri-tigan-is-joined-to-the-dax-sym: Ezri Tigan is joined to the Dax symbiont.
2375-following-the-end-of-the-dominion-w: Following the Dominion War's end and Cardassia's liberation, Elim Garak remains on Cardassia, his exile from his homeworld officially over.
2375-gabriel-hwang-is-vaccinated-for-the: Gabriel Hwang is vaccinated for Andorian flu, tetanus, and typhoid.
2375-general-martok-assumes-the-leadersh: General Martok assumes leadership of the Klingon Empire as Chancellor of the High Council after Lieutenant Commander Worf kills former Chancellor Gowron in a duel.
2375-grand-nagus-zek-crosses-over-to-the: Grand Nagus Zek crosses over into the mirror universe and is captured by the Klingon-Cardassian Alliance; Quark and Rom free him by giving Regent Worf a cloaking device from the IKS Rotarran, but Worf's subsequent attack on Terok Nor fails and he is captured by the Terran Rebellion.
2375-in-an-alternate-timeline-voyager-is: In an alternate timeline, Voyager is destroyed by problems with the slipstream drive; the Delta Flyer, which had mapped the slipstream ahead of Voyager, returns to Earth carrying Harry Kim and Chakotay.

In another alternate timeline, a temporal disruptor planted by 29th-century Captain Braxton destroys Voyager, until the crew of the USS Relativity, aided by Seven of Nine from this year, prevent the disaster.
2375-in-league-with-the-surgically-alter: In league with the surgically altered Dukat and under the Pah-wraiths' influence, Kai Winn Adami consults the forbidden Book of the Kosst Amojan to learn how to release the Pah-wraiths from the Bajoran Fire Caves.
2375-jadzia-dax-vic-fontaine-brunt-and-e: In the mirror universe, Jadzia Dax, Vic Fontaine, Brunt, and Elim Garak are killed.
2375-julian-bashir-uses-illegal-romulan-: Julian Bashir uses illegal Romulan mind probes to extract information about the morphogenic virus from Section 31 operative Luther Sloan, who commits suicide during the procedure; Bashir then produces a cure and successfully administers it to Odo.
2375-kasidy-yates-sisko-announces-that-s: Kasidy Yates-Sisko announces she is pregnant with Benjamin Sisko's child.
2375-kira-nerys-is-given-a-temporary-com: Kira Nerys receives a temporary Starfleet commander's commission and travels to Cardassia with Odo and Elim Garak to help Damar with the Cardassian Rebellion against the Dominion.
2375-kira-nerys-is-transported-to-empok-: Kira Nerys is transported to Empok Nor, where she discovers Dukat now leads the Cult of the Pah-wraiths.
2375-lieutenant-chu-lak-carries-out-a-sp: Lieutenant Chu'lak carries out a spree of murders aboard Deep Space 9 before Lieutenant Ezri Dax, drawing on psychological insight from her murderous former host Joran Dax, stops him.
2375-lurak-t-luco-is-arrested-on-remus-h: Lurak T'Luco is arrested on Remus and charged with possession of stolen firearms and dangerous materials, but the charges are dismissed for insufficient evidence.
2375-miles-o-brien-disappears-on-new-syd: Miles O'Brien disappears on New Sydney while searching for Morica Bilby; Ezri Dax returns to her home on Sappora VII to enlist her mother Yanas's help, and discovers her brothers' ties to the Orion Syndicate, including that her younger brother Norvo murdered Bilby's wife.
2375-nog-returns-to-deep-space-9-from-st: Nog returns to Deep Space 9 from Starbase 235 with counseling and a replacement leg, but, unable to cope with life after AR-558, retreats into the holographic refuge of Vic Fontaine's lounge.
2375-odo-discovers-another-of-the-hundre: Odo discovers Laas, another of the Hundred; the Changeling lives on Deep Space 9 for a time before killing a Klingon, and Kira Nerys helps him escape.
2375-odo-learns-that-he-is-infected-with: Odo learns he is infected with the same morphogenic virus killing the Founders; Doctor Julian Bashir discovers Section 31 created the virus and used Odo to transmit it into the Great Link.
2375-odo-leaves-the-alpha-quadrant-to-re: Odo leaves the Alpha Quadrant to rejoin the Founders in the Great Link, curing them of the morphogenic virus.
2375-richard-bashir-is-released-from-pri: Richard Bashir is released from prison this year.
2375-rom-succeeds-zek-as-ferengi-grand-n: Rom succeeds Zek as Ferengi Grand Nagus.
2375-species-8472-creates-a-simulation-o: Species 8472 builds a simulation of Earth on a Delta Quadrant space station to train its members to infiltrate Starfleet Command, until Voyager convinces them the Federation poses no threat.
2375-the-alternate-voyager-created-by-th: The alternate Voyager created by the Silver Blood on the class Y planet begins losing molecular cohesion after exposure to an enhanced warp drive; Captain Kathryn Janeway delays seeking shelter at a Y-class world until too late, and though the crew tries to launch a message drone with their history, it is destroyed and the ship disintegrates before reaching the real Voyager.
2375-the-breen-attack-on-earth-takes-pla: The Breen attack Earth, severely damaging San Francisco.
2375-the-breen-confederacy-becomes-forma: The Breen Confederacy formally allies with the Dominion.
2375-the-brunali-homeworld-is-attacked-b: The Borg Collective attacks the Brunali homeworld.
2375-the-chief-of-operations-of-deep-spa: Deep Space 9's chief of operations, Miles O'Brien, and his family leave the station for Earth, where he takes a position as a Starfleet Academy engineering professor.
2375-the-dominion-war-comes-to-an-end-af: The Dominion War ends after an alliance of the Federation, Klingon Empire, Romulan Star Empire, and the turncoat Cardassian fleet takes the Cardassian system at the Battle of Cardassia; in the captured Dominion Headquarters, Odo cures the Female Changeling of the morphogenic virus, and she orders Dominion forces to surrender.
2375-the-evora-become-protectorate-membe: The Evora become a Federation protectorate.
2375-the-iks-rotarran-destroys-the-monac: Worf, Martok, Miles O'Brien, Julian Bashir, and Quark undertake a mission in the late Jadzia Dax's name so her spirit can enter Sto-vo-kor, destroying the Monac shipyard aboard the IKS Rotarran by triggering a solar plasma ejection.
2375-the-phage-has-supposedly-been-cured: The Think Tank supposedly cures the Phage this year.
2375-the-romulan-star-empire-constructs-: The Romulan Star Empire builds a hospital on the Bajoran moon Derna, secretly equipping it with several thousand plasma torpedoes; Colonel Kira Nerys leads a blockade in protest, and the standoff ends after Starfleet Admiral William Ross threatens Federation intervention.
2375-the-uss-defiant-is-destroyed-by-a-b: A Breen energy-dampening weapon destroys the Defiant in the Second Battle of Chin'toka.
2375-the-uss-defiant-visits-ar-558-on-th: The Defiant visits AR-558 on the front line of the battle with the Dominion, and after seeing the losses the Starfleet unit stationed there has taken, Benjamin Sisko stays until reinforcements arrive; the defenders hold the captured Dominion communications array despite heavy losses, and Nog loses a leg to Jem'Hadar fire.
2375-the-uss-sao-paulo-is-renamed-the-us: The USS Sao Paulo is renamed Defiant under Benjamin Sisko.
2375-the-voyager-crew-builds-the-delta-f: The Voyager crew builds the Delta Flyer shuttlecraft.
2375-tom-paris-is-demoted-to-the-rank-of: Tom Paris is demoted to ensign for insubordination and serves thirty days in the brig after circumventing the Prime Directive at a Monean-occupied planetoid and damaging the Delta Flyer.
2375-uss-voyager-encounters-the-uss-equi: Voyager encounters the USS Equinox, another Starfleet ship stranded in the Delta Quadrant whose crew had broken the Prime Directive by killing nucleogenic lifeforms to fuel an enhanced warp drive; the Equinox deserts Voyager after stealing a shield emitter meant to stop the lifeforms' attacks, and the aliens then attack Voyager itself.
2375-voyager-attempts-to-use-quantum-sli: Voyager attempts quantum slipstream drive again, traveling ten thousand light-years before the slipstream collapses, and the technology is judged too dangerous to use repeatedly.
2375-voyager-enters-a-sparsely-populated: Voyager enters a sparsely populated region called the Void, where a subspace vortex brings the ship two thousand light-years closer to home.
2375-voyager-raids-a-borg-sphere-and-ste: Voyager raids a Borg sphere and steals a transwarp coil that lets it travel twenty thousand light-years; the Borg Queen lures Seven of Nine back to the Collective, but the crew rescues her.
2375-vulcan-captain-solok-challenges-old: Vulcan Captain Solok challenges old rival Benjamin Sisko to a baseball game; Sisko's Niners lose to Solok's Logicians in one of Quark's holosuites.
2375-worf-takes-command-of-the-iks-korag: Worf takes command of the IKS Koraga, which is later destroyed; he escapes in a pod and is rescued by Ezri Dax, but the two are then captured by the Breen.
2378-miral-paris-daughter-of-b-elanna-to: B'Elanna Torres and Tom Paris's daughter Miral is born as Voyager reaches home.
2379-after-the-death-of-shinzon-the-init: Shinzon's death clears the way for continued Federation–Romulan rapprochement.
2379-captain-jean-luc-picard-is-ordered-: Picard is sent to Romulus after a coup installs a new government offering peace.
2379-evidence-suggests-but-other-interpr: Evidence suggests Wesley Crusher had returned to Starfleet as a lieutenant junior grade by this year.
2379-kathryn-janeway-is-a-vice-admiral-s: Kathryn Janeway serves as a vice admiral at Starfleet Command.
2379-the-enterprise-e-is-towed-back-to-e: The damaged Enterprise-E is towed home to Earth for repair.
2379-the-shuttlecraft-argo-is-tested-for: The shuttlecraft Argo is first tested on Kolarus III, where Soong's prototype B-4 is found.
2379-the-uss-archer-uss-aries-uss-galaxy: Seven starships form Battle Group Omega to reinforce the Enterprise.
2379-william-riker-is-promoted-to-captai: Riker is promoted to captain of the Titan, with Troi transferring as counsellor.
2379-william-t-riker-and-deanna-troi-are: Riker and Troi marry on Earth; the Betazed ceremony is cut short by the summons to Romulus.
2381-beverly-crusher-leaves-the-enterpri: Beverly Crusher steps away from the Enterprise to bring up her son Jack.
2382-the-protostar-is-launched-from-the-: The Protostar launches from the San Francisco Fleet Yards under Chakotay, with Adreek-Hu as first officer.
2385-compromised-synthetics-are-used-by-: Synthetics compromised by the Zhat Vash set Mars ablaze and destroy the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards.
2385-the-crew-prevent-asencia-from-using: The crew stop Asencia's time-space weapons and return the Protostar to its place in the timeline.
2386-having-been-captured-and-taken-to-v: Icheb is stripped of his Borg components by Bjayzl on Vergessen, and Seven of Nine ends his suffering.
2387-ambassador-spock-plans-to-pilot-a-s: Spock prepares a red-matter ship to collapse the Romulan supernova into an artificial black hole.
2387-spock-launches-red-matter-into-the-: Spock's red matter neutralises the supernova, and the resulting black hole swallows his ship and Nero's.
2401-separate-from-jurati-s-borg-the-ori: The Borg Collective plots to assimilate Starfleet from within on Frontier Day, using Changelings as infiltrators.
2401-seven-of-nine-is-promoted-to-captai: Seven of Nine is promoted to captain.
2415-a-message-sent-in-2364-by-the-uss-e: A message the Enterprise sent from M-33 in 2364 finally comes within Starfleet's range.
2415-in-2365-doctor-katherine-pulaski-pr: The year Katherine Pulaski expected replicative fading to have finished off the Mariposans.
2415-in-2378-the-crew-of-the-uss-voyager: The arrival date Voyager's crew still expected as of 2378.
2420-if-quark-had-sold-a-small-cloaking-: The year a fifty-year sentence threatened against Quark in 2370 would have run out.
2422-nog-is-a-starfleet-captain-jake-sis: Captain Nog takes the Defiant out as Jake Sisko tries to free his father from displaced time.
2423-solosos-iii-is-expected-to-become-i: Solosos III is reckoned habitable for humans again by now.
2431-according-to-benjamin-sisko-in-2371: Meridian is due back in the prime universe, by Sisko's 2371 reckoning.
2436-dal-r-el-zero-maj-el-and-jankom-pog: Dal R'El, Zero, Maj'el and Jankom Pog trigger a paradox that throws the Protostar into the past.
2436-the-uss-protostar-is-sent-forward-i: The USS Protostar arrives here from the late 24th century.
2446-in-2371-at-the-very-beginning-of-th: The homecoming date Voyager's crew first expected at the outset of their journey.
2450-jake-sisko-dies-thus-releasing-his-: Jake Sisko's death breaks the subspace link holding his father, erasing this timeline.
2468-in-2372-jadzia-dax-predicted-that-m: The peaceful death Jadzia Dax forecast for Miles O'Brien back in 2372.
2472-according-to-q-in-2372-around-this-: Q's 2372 estimate for when humans would reach the Delta Quadrant.
2472-sometime-during-this-century-barzan: Barzan II joins the Federation at some point this century.
2472-sometime-during-this-century-the-me: Starship construction methods unchanged since the 23rd century fall out of use this century.
2507-the-terran-empire-would-have-succum: Mirror Spock's rough forecast for the Halkan-predicted revolt toppling the Terran Empire.
2553-the-federation-is-claimed-to-have-d: The Federation is said to destroy the Xindi homeworld around this time.
2554-in-the-future-shown-to-jonathan-arc: In the future Daniels showed Archer, the Federation breaks the Sphere-Builder invasion at Procyon V.
2562-a-neutron-star-in-a-binary-star-sys: A neutron star in the Kavis Alpha sector explodes.
2568-a-robot-ship-launched-to-the-androm: A robot ship bound for Kelva in Andromeda is due to arrive.
2569-fred-sees-a-tan-zhekran-for-the-las: Fred sees a tan zhekran for the last time before his death in 3191.
2573-a-component-that-will-be-used-in-th: A component of the Xindi weapon is built, later sent back to the 22nd century by the Sphere-Builders.
2590-the-last-known-contact-between-the-: The last recorded contact between the Federation and the Q Continuum.
2664-the-earliest-date-the-microbrains-o: The earliest the microbrains of Velara III would consider talking to the Federation again.
2666-in-the-middle-of-this-century-the-s: Kal Dano builds the Tox Uthat, a device capable of stopping fusion in a star.
2671-the-hundred-changelings-were-expect: The Hundred were expected back in the Great Link around now.
2676-at-captain-janeway-s-command-enough: Janeway's repairs leave the Nakan memorial powered until this year.
2695-the-doctor-adds-an-aging-program-to: The Doctor adds an ageing program to his matrix.
2757-atomic-decay-measurements-taken-on-: Decay readings put a probe from the USS Discovery in this era, five centuries ahead of its launch.
2758-a-neutron-star-in-a-binary-star-sys: Another neutron star explosion in the Kavis Alpha sector.
2769-a-group-of-federation-anthropologis: Federation anthropologists travel back to observe the building of the Great Pyramid at Giza.
2780-approximate-decade-the-uss-cerritos: Roughly when the Cerritos would reach Deep Space 6 from Piskes IX at full impulse.
2868-it-was-estimated-that-the-kelvans-r: The estimated arrival of the Kelvans' reply to the Federation's message.
2873-in-an-alternate-timeline-henry-star: In an alternate timeline Henry Starling, flying the stolen timeship Aeon, overshoots into this era.
2954-a-neutron-star-in-a-binary-star-sys: A third neutron star explosion in the Kavis Alpha sector.
2958-the-dilithium-supplies-in-the-galax: Galactic dilithium begins running out, and the Federation trials other warp designs.
2975-information-on-something-commission: Daniels' temporal database records a hull design commissioned this year.
2991-daniels-temporal-database-contains-: Daniels' database records two further craft commissioned this year.
3052-an-earth-vessel-travels-back-to-the: An Earth vessel is lost travelling back to the 22nd century, killing its pilot.
3052-daniels-fearing-a-change-in-the-tim: Daniels pulls Archer to this century, and the move wrecks the timeline he came from.
3064-while-on-a-mission-to-investigate-a: The Khi'eth crashes in the Verubin Nebula while surveying a dilithium nursery.
3065-starfleet-academy-closes-for-unknow: Starfleet Academy closes, for reasons unrecorded.
3069-most-of-the-milky-way-galaxy-s-dili: The Burn renders almost all galactic dilithium inert, destroying countless ships and lives.
3070-captain-jean-luc-picard-estimated-t: Picard's estimate for how long the core of Atrea IV would stay molten.
3074-in-the-delta-quadrant-a-kyrian-hist: The Kyrian historian Quarren finds and revives a backup of The Doctor.
3089-a-federation-starship-visits-ni-var: The last Federation ship calls at Ni'Var until Discovery's mission a century later.
3089-deep-space-253-begins-trading-with-: Deep Space 253 opens trade with an Emerald Chain mercantile.
3089-starfleet-leaves-earth-and-united-e: Starfleet quits Earth, and United Earth quits the Federation.
3102-the-federation-visits-deep-space-25: The Federation's last visit to Deep Space 253.
3125-a-retrofitted-dorsal-carrier-design: A retrofitted dorsal carrier, design XRT-55D, enters service.
3148-aditya-sahil-begins-his-forty-plus-: Aditya Sahil begins a watch over a Federation relay station that will last four decades.
3164-lura-thok-graduates-from-the-war-co: Lura Thok completes the War College.
3174-kyheem-begins-working-for-the-emera: Kyheem takes work with the Emerald Chain.
3176-anisha-mir-is-sentenced-to-a-rehabi: Anisha Mir is sent to a rehabilitation camp as Nus Braka's accomplice.
3176-caleb-mir-escapes-from-the-federati: Caleb Mir escapes the Federation outpost at Pikaru.
3176-nus-braka-is-sentenced-to-a-federat: Nus Braka is sent to a penal colony for stealing rations and killing a supply pilot.
3177-senna-tal-sends-out-a-message-for-a: Senna Tal calls anyone still loyal to the Federation to meet him on Earth.
3178-caleb-mir-is-charged-with-petty-the: Caleb Mir faces a petty theft charge.
3182-caleb-mir-is-charged-with-destructi: Caleb Mir is charged with destroying property.
3184-caleb-mir-is-charged-with-vandalism: Caleb Mir faces a vandalism charge.
3186-doctor-gabrielle-burnham-mother-of-: Gabrielle Burnham is thrown 950 years forward from 2236 by the Project Daedalus suit.
3187-admiral-senna-tal-dies-of-unknown-c: Admiral Senna Tal dies, the cause unrecorded.
3188-adira-becomes-joined-with-the-tal-s: Adira is joined with the Tal symbiont, once carried by Admiral Tal and Gray Tal.
3188-caleb-mir-is-charged-with-illegal-t: Caleb Mir faces a charge of illegal trading.
3188-michael-burnham-emerges-from-the-23: Michael Burnham arrives from the 23rd century, crashes on Hima, and sends the Red Angel suit back.
3188-michael-burnham-meets-adiatya-sahil: Burnham finds Aditya Sahil and commissions him as acting communications chief to help her locate Discovery.
3188-michael-burnham-meets-cleveland-boo: Burnham meets Cleveland Booker and helps him run a trance worm to Sanctuary Four.
